summary: Applied two surgical continuity anchors: one at entry to carry forward the prior chapter's pre-dawn schedule pressure, and one at exit to point directly into the next chapter's six-thirty Midtown qualifier check-in.
edits: Adjusted the opening sentence to reference the 4:40 wake-up so Chapter 6's ending pressure carries into Chapter 7's entry.
Added a six-thirty Midtown qualifier sign-in reference in the closing alarm paragraph to tighten the Chapter 7 to Chapter 8 handoff.
